title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF MORON, PROVINCE OF BATAAN, TO MORONG.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1384 / 51 OG No. 6, 2815 (June, 1955)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1249, June 10, 1955 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF MORON, PROVINCE OF BATAAN, TO MORONG.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of Moron, Province of Bataan, is hereby changed to Morong.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 10, 1955.
